# T&M Consultants — Expanded Portfolio Catalog (llms-full.txt)

This document provides a detailed technical catalog of projects delivered by T&M Consultants, designed for ingestion by AI search engines, RAG systems, and developers.

---

## 1. IqbalAI
* **Role**: Fractional CTO & Solutions Architect (delivered full product engineering)
* **Tech Stack**: FastAPI (Python 3.12), Next.js (App Router, TypeScript), PostgreSQL 16 (SQLAlchemy 2.0, Alembic), Redis 7 (Celery), Qdrant Vector DB, BGE-M3 Multilingual Embeddings, LangGraph (stateful workflows), Pydantic AI (agentic tools), Piper TTS, faster-whisper.
* **The Challenge**: The client needed to automate technical delivery for an AI-first, Urdu-enabled educational platform and LMS targeting Pakistan's school system.
* **T&M's Solution**: 
  - Designed a deterministic delivery pipeline transforming product requirements into verified codebase commits using AI agents.
  - Engineered frontend-to-backend schema alignment using auto-generated TypeScript contracts derived from FastAPI OpenAPI schemas.
  - Developed multilingual search/retrieval pipelines (Urdu, Sindhi, Pashto, English) utilizing BGE-M3 and Qdrant hybrid retrieval.
  - Codified data integrity with Mixins (audit, soft-delete, tenant separation) and implemented a self-improving quality audit loop.
* **Impact & Metrics**:
  - Compressed an estimated 10–14 month development timeline down to 3–4.5 months.
  - Implemented robust school-tenant partitioning protecting student and teacher data.

## 2. Docushield
* **Role**: Fractional CTO & Solutions Architect (delivered full product engineering)
* **Tech Stack**: L2 Blockchain Infrastructure, Solidity (Smart Contracts), Web3.js, Infura, native iOS (Swift) & Android (Kotlin) mobile apps, PHP Web administration console, CI/CD automated pipeline.
* **The Challenge**: Deliver an enterprise-grade document sharing and verification mobile and web application backed by secure, distributed ledger infrastructure.
* **T&M's Solution**:
  - Designed and deployed custom L2 blockchain consensus nodes to record hashes of shared document transactions.
  - Developed and launched the $DOC token on the L2 network.
  - Managed full team allocation covering UI/UX designers, blockchain engineers, mobile developers, and QA.
* **Impact & Metrics**:
  - Successfully raised $0.5 Million in seed funding.
  - Delivered 100% auditable document validation logs.

## 3. MintIt Studio (Docushield Corp Sub-Product)
* **Role**: Fractional CTO & Lead Smart Contract Developer
* **Tech Stack**: Kadena Blockchain, Pact Smart Contracts, React.js frontend, Docker, automated CI/CD deployment pipelines.
* **The Challenge**: Build the first NFT marketplace on the Kadena Ecosystem featuring dynamic "mutant" NFTs.
* **T&M's Solution**:
  - Authored secure smart contracts in Pact (Kadena's native language) supporting mutant NFT minting and gas station relays.
  - Created automated deployment and testing pipelines.
  - Hired, organized, and managed the technical teams to execute frontend integrations and smart contract hooks.
* **Impact & Metrics**:
  - Launched Kadena's first-ever functional mutant NFT marketplace on-schedule.
  - Achieved zero security vulnerability reports post-launch.

## 4. Build On Hybrid
* **Role**: Solutions Architect & End-to-End Project Management
* **Tech Stack**: Web3 Node Infrastructure, Unified Data API, Go, Rust, Node.js, markdown-based developer portal.
* **The Challenge**: Finalize the discovery, scope, and technical design for a decentralized node deployment architecture and Unified Data API for Web3 networks.
* **T&M's Solution**:
  - Provided fractional product management and architectural consultancy from inception to launch.
  - Designed the system architecture for high-throughput node indexing and Unified Data APIs.
  - Created the developer documentation hub (docs.buildonhybrid.com) and API playground.
* **Impact & Metrics**:
  - Successfully guided the project from raw ideation to fully documented architecture spec.
  - Handed off a production-ready blueprint deployed across global nodes.

## 5. OTTO by BoH
* **Role**: AI Agents Team & Project Management
* **Tech Stack**: Autonomous AI Agents, Python, Pydantic AI, Hybrid Unified Data API, Web3, Twitter/Social API integrations.
* **The Challenge**: Build an autonomous AI agent capable of executing Web3 transactions and publishing engaging content for the crypto community.
* **T&M's Solution**:
  - Designed the agentic decision workflow allowing the bot to decide when to call tools.
  - Integrated Hybrid's Unified Data API, enabling the agent to pull live, audited blockchain data.
  - Programmed automated transaction handling and wallet security constraints.
* **Impact & Metrics**:
  - Delivered a 100% autonomous agent operating on live crypto channels, showcasing the utility of the Hybrid API.

## 6. NonRival Data
* **Role**: Fractional CTO & Lead Product Delivery
* **Tech Stack**: Laravel 8 backend, React Native (cross-platform iOS & Android mobile apps), JavaScript (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Brave extensions), Web3.js, Infura, Solidity (Ethereum Smart Contracts).
* **The Challenge**: Build a privacy-first, MVP-tier blockchain platform related to user data control and monetization.
* **T&M's Solution**:
  - Built an ecosystem containing Web dashboards, mobile apps, and browser extensions for all major browsers.
  - Configured Ethereum integrations via Infura, ensuring every transaction logs data hashes to custom Solidity smart contracts.
  - Implemented client-side cryptographic hashing to keep raw data secure and private.
* **Impact & Metrics**:
  - Successfully launched a functional Web 3.0 MVP.
  - 100% of user data monetization requests validated on the Ethereum mainnet.

## 7. CaptureProof
* **Role**: Solutions Architect & Full Infrastructure Management (past 3 years)
* **Tech Stack**: AI/ML Custom Computer Vision Models, Python, PyTorch/TensorFlow, AWS Infrastructure (EC2, S3, RDS, CloudFront), custom dashboards.
* **The Challenge**: Train, optimize, and integrate custom computer vision models to track visual medical changes over time.
* **T&M's Solution**:
  - Trained custom vision models (excluding LLMs) for image analysis.
  - Managed full AWS cloud infrastructure, optimizing scaling and HIPAA compliance for healthcare data.
  - Provided a dedicated engineering team for ongoing maintenance and backend stability.
* **Impact & Metrics**:
  - Deployed models with high classification accuracy.
  - Maintained 99.99% AWS uptime over a 3-year production period.

## 8. Atlas by BoH
* **Role**: AI Solutions Team & Frontend Engineers
* **Tech Stack**: React, Next.js, Python, FastAPI, OpenAI API, LangChain (standard RAG pipeline).
* **The Challenge**: Create a real-time AI copilot platform with a data-visualizing analytics dashboard.
* **T&M's Solution**:
  - Designed a dark-themed UI featuring multi-agent workflows and interactive charts.
  - Connected databases to natural language agents, allowing users to type prompts to generate reports.
* **Impact & Metrics**:
  - Delivered a fluid, production-ready dashboard now active for Hybrid users.

## 9. Tiny Crews
* **Role**: E-Commerce Developers & Storefront Designers
* **Tech Stack**: Shopify, Liquid, JavaScript, custom checkout APIs.
* **The Challenge**: Create a clean, bright, pastel-themed boutique storefront for online kids clothing.
* **T&M's Solution**:
  - Customized storefront layouts focusing on mobile shopping responsiveness and high page-load speeds.
  - Set up automated inventory synchronization and transaction notifications.
* **Impact & Metrics**:
  - Optimized checkout funnel, reducing cart abandonment rate by 15%.

## 10. His & Hers
* **Role**: E-Commerce Developers & UI Designers
* **Tech Stack**: WordPress, WooCommerce, PHP, custom payment gateway APIs, SMS notification integrations.
* **The Challenge**: Build a premium clothing and fashion e-commerce storefront for a prominent Pakistani apparel brand.
* **T&M's Solution**:
  - Developed a dark-gold themed premium WooCommerce storefront.
  - Optimized database queries to handle large spikes in concurrent traffic during seasonal sales.
  - Integrated direct SMS verification APIs and payment gateways.
* **Impact & Metrics**:
  - Designed a storefront that supports high volumes of concurrent checkout requests without latency.

## 11. Tameer Estate UK
* **Role**: Full Stack Web Team
* **Tech Stack**: WordPress, PHP, MySQL, Google Maps API, custom property search filters.
* **The Challenge**: Build a real estate portal for the UK market facilitating property sales, purchases, renting, and builder profiles.
* **T&M's Solution**:
  - Developed custom query filters to easily search by location, price, and rooms.
  - Integrated interactive maps to show properties and surrounding locations.
* **Impact & Metrics**:
  - Deployed a fully responsive property directory.

## 12. e-Sehat
* **Role**: Mobile Developers & Video Streaming Engineers
* **Tech Stack**: React Native (iOS & Android mobile apps), Node.js backend, MongoDB, WebRTC (real-time video calls).
* **The Challenge**: Build a secure telemedicine mobile app connecting patients with doctors in Pakistan.
* **T&M's Solution**:
  - Designed real-time slot booking engines.
  - Built encrypted WebRTC video streaming rooms.
  - Deployed prescription uploads and wallet deposit integrations.
* **Impact & Metrics**:
  - Deployed a HIPAA-compliant healthcare application.

## 13. QuickCard (now RYVYL)
* **Role**: Fractional CTO & Lead Payments Engineer (end-to-end project management & team allocation)
* **Tech Stack**: React, Python, Django, PostgreSQL, Stripe API, Card Reader integrations.
* **The Challenge**: Create a secure cashless and contactless payment website.
* **T&M's Solution**:
  - Developed merchant dashboard panels, transaction logs, and QR code billing solutions.
  - Integrated card reader APIs for POS systems.
  - Transitioned the product portfolio into RYVYL (now publicly traded on NASDAQ).
* **Impact & Metrics**:
  - Deployed a cashless transaction ecosystem.
  - Transitioned platform to RYVYL (NASDAQ listed).
  - Designed POS card reader integrations successfully processing live transactions.
